summary: Transition Zoom Through component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的缩放穿越转场组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/transition-zoom-through/src/TransitionZoomThrough.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TransitionZoomThrough` and `transitionZoomThroughDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Transition Zoom Through Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/transition-zoom-through to my project. Preserve the exported TransitionZoomThroughProps API and register the TransitionZoomThrough composition with the default props.
